title: PolicyDecision
description: Protocol-owned policy decision family for deterministic allow, deny, and require-human-approval outcomes bound to hashed inputs.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for policy decisions.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this policy decision.

decision_outcome.description: Deterministic policy outcome for the evaluated action request.

policy_reason_code.description: Machine-consumed reason code explaining the deterministic policy outcome. Runtime enforcement must validate this value against the active policy_reason_code registry.

manifest_hash.description: Hash of the active manifest context evaluated by the policy engine.

action_request_hash.description: Hash of the action request evaluated by policy.

relevant_artifact_hashes.description: Artifact hashes that materially affected this decision. An empty array is valid when no artifacts were relevant.

items.description: Hash of one artifact included in policy evaluation.

policy_input_hashes.description: Hashes of other evaluated policy inputs, such as allowlists or policy documents, beyond the manifest and action request.

items.description: Hash of one additional policy input used during evaluation.

details_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for the structured policy-decision details payload.

details.description: Structured decision details payload whose shape is defined by details_schema_id.

required_approval_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for the required-approval payload when policy requires human approval.

required_approval.description: Structured machine-checkable payload describing the approval request context required by this policy decision.
